prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约4302名→4349名→5332名→4421名→4963名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年出现明显后移（5332名），2024年短暂回 升至4421名，2025年再次后移至4963名，近3年累计后移约630名；2025年基准位次约4963名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为20人，2024–2025年 增至21人，2026年计划仍为21人，与近两年持平，无扩招或缩招变化，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校 ，软科中国大学排名2026年第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属于中上水平211院校，在电力行业具有显著影响力；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情 或投档断档记录；抖音平台热度一般，未进入总排名前106名，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度无明显升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A等级，动力 工程及工程热物理获评A-等级，均为该校王牌学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气类、能源动力类专业社会热度持续偏高，新能源与电力行业人才需求旺盛，相关专业报考热度不减；海南省2026年高考报名总人数约78000人（较2025年67408人 增长约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；电气工程及其自动化专业在海南省录取位次常年位居该校各专业之首（2025年约1292名），对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年 招生计划持平、海南省考生规模显著扩大（+15.7%）以及学校声誉平稳、电气王牌专业持续热门等因素，预计2026年该校在海南省综合类最低录取位次将较2025年小幅后移。预测 最低位次约5033名，区间4533–5533名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（4533–5533名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业（电气工程及其自动化）作为冲刺目标、三档专业作为稳妥保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（<4 533名），可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化等A级学科专业；若位次接近区间上限（>5533名），建议以三档专业保底并关注二档中位次相对靠后的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 4302 → 4349 → 5332 → 4421 → 4963, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (5332), followed by a brief recovery to 4421 in 2024, and another backward shift to 4963 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 630 positions over the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4963. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 20 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 21 students in 2024 and 2025, and remains at 21 students for 2026, consistent with the past two years, with no expansion or reduction, indicating stable enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 84th, with a stable ranking range of 75–84 in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 institutions, with significant influence in the electric power industry. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. Its popularity on Douyin is average, not entering the top 106 overall rankings, with low short video exposure, indicating no significant increase in application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics were rated A-, both being flagship disciplines of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors in electrical and energy power fields continue to have high social popularity, with strong demand for talent in the new energy and electric power industries, and the application enthusiasm for related majors remains high. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination applicants in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The Electrical Engineering and Automation major has consistently ranked first among all majors in the province (approximately 1292 in 2025), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Hainan Province (+15.7%), the stable reputation of the university, and the continued popularity of the flagship electrical major, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5033, with a range of 4533–5533.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (4533–5533), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation) as a stretch goal, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4533), you can prioritize applying for A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5533), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net and consider Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.
